r_3cf54dd76dde4dc784d259e4c918dcab.expression: IF(POS(Year)=1, Drivers::[Driver.OpeningRetainedEarnings, Year[THIS]], [BS.RetainedEarnings, Year[PREV]] + PL::[PL.NetIncome, Year[THIS]])
